# openai_organization_spend_alert (Resource)

Manage an organization spend alert.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_organization_spend_alert" "example" {
  threshold_amount                = 20
  currency                        = "USD"
  interval                        = "month"
  notification_channel_type       = "email"
  notification_channel_recipients = ["terraform@example.com"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `currency` (String) currency
- `interval` (String) interval
- `notification_channel_recipients` (List of String) notification channel recipients
- `notification_channel_type` (String) notification channel type
- `threshold_amount` (Number) threshold amount

### Optional

- `notification_channel_subject_prefix` (String) notification channel subject prefix

### Read-Only

- `alert_id` (String) alert id
- `id` (String) id

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = openai_organization_spend_alert.example
  id = "alert_123"
}
```
